title: Senior Financial Analyst - Max Life Insurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Max Life Insurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Life Insurance! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Life Insurance:
Max Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance!
